'''Catharese''' was the written and spoken [[language]] of the [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]]. Communication in Catharese included remarking some spoken words with a growl. Cathars were usually also fluent in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic|''Knights of the Old Republic'']], the Cathar [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Juhani]] speaks Basic, albeit with an accent that includes rolled "r"s and "w"s that sound like "v"s.<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

{{Language-stub}}
